## Install

```bash
pnpm add @florexlabs/ui
pnpm add react react-dom tailwindcss
pnpm add @phosphor-icons/react  # optional
```

## Setup

Import the CSS tokens in your app entry:

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@florexlabs/ui/florex.css";
```

## Quick Start

```tsx
import { Button, Card, Badge } from "@florexlabs/ui";

<Card variant="hover">
  <Button variant="primary">Save</Button>
  <Badge tone="brand">New</Badge>
</Card>
```

## Links

- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@florexlabs/ui)

# Accordion

A collapsible content panel built on native `<details>` elements.

## Import

```tsx
import { Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent } from '@florex/ui';
```

## Usage

```tsx
<Accordion>
  <AccordionItem>
    <AccordionTrigger>Is it accessible?</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Yes, it uses native HTML details/summary elements.</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>
```

## Sub-components

### Accordion

Root wrapper that applies dividers between items.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | `ReactNode` | — | AccordionItem elements |
| className | `string` | — | Additional CSS classes |

### AccordionItem

Wraps a single collapsible section using `<details>`.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | `ReactNode` | — | Trigger and content elements |
| className | `string` | — | Additional CSS classes |

### AccordionTrigger

The clickable header rendered as `<summary>`. Includes a chevron icon that rotates on open.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | `ReactNode` | — | Trigger label |
| className | `string` | — | Additional CSS classes |

### AccordionContent

The collapsible body content.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | `ReactNode` | — | Content to reveal |
| className | `string` | — | Additional CSS classes |

## Examples

### Multiple items

```tsx
<Accordion>
  <AccordionItem>
    <AccordionTrigger>What is Florex UI?</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>A modern React component library with a dark-first design.</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
  <AccordionItem>
    <AccordionTrigger>Is it customizable?</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Yes, all components accept className for full Tailwind customization.</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
  <AccordionItem>
    <AccordionTrigger>Does it support SSR?</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Yes, it uses native HTML elements that work without JavaScript.</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>
```

# Alert

Displays a contextual feedback message with optional icon.

## Import

```tsx
import { Alert } from '@florex/ui';
```

## Usage

```tsx
<Alert variant="info">Your changes have been saved.</Alert>
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'info' \| 'success' \| 'warning' \| 'danger'` | `'info'` | Visual style of the alert |
| icon | `ReactNode` | — | Icon displayed before the content |
| children | `ReactNode` | — | Alert message content |
| className | `string` | — | Additional CSS classes |

## Examples

### With icon

```tsx
import { Info, CheckCircle, Warning, XCircle } from '@phosphor-icons/react';

<Alert variant="info" icon={<Info size={18} />}>
  A new version is available.
</Alert>

<Alert variant="success" icon={<CheckCircle size={18} />}>
  Your profile has been updated.
</Alert>

<Alert variant="warning" icon={<Warning size={18} />}>
  Your trial expires in 3 days.
</Alert>

<Alert variant="danger" icon={<XCircle size={18} />}>
  Failed to save changes.
</Alert>
```

# Breadcrumb

### BreadcrumbLink

A clickable breadcrumb segment rendered as `<a>`.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| href | `string` | — | Link destination |
| children | `ReactNode` | — | Link label |
| className | `string` | — | Additional CSS classes |

## Examples

### With icons

```tsx

# Button

A versatile button with multiple variants, sizes, and a loading state.

## Import

import { Button } from '@florex/ui';

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'primary' \| 'secondary' \| 'ghost' \| 'danger'` | `'primary'` | Visual style |
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Button size |
| loading | `boolean` | `false` | Shows a spinner and disables the button |

| className | `string` | — | Additional CSS classes |

### Loading state

```tsx

```

### With icon

# Checkbox

A styled checkbox input with optional label.

## Import

```tsx
import { Checkbox } from '@florex/ui';
```

## Usage

```tsx
<Checkbox label="Accept terms" />
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | `string` | — | Text label displayed next to the checkbox |
| id | `string` | — | HTML id (links label to input) |
| className | `string` | — | Additional CSS classes |

Also accepts all native `<input>` HTML attributes (except `type`).

## Examples

### Controlled

```tsx

```

### Disabled

```tsx

```
